center.name: John Gerrard Keulemans
center.summary: John Gerrard Keulemans是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括灰头娇鹟、Black-throated robin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-throated robin (Plesiodryas albonotata) is a species of passerine bird in the Australisian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-headed piprites (Piprites griseiceps) is a species of bird in subfamily Pipritinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Costa Rica, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, and Panama.Snow, D
